sent_simp: 管理混乱导致公司最终垮台。
sent_trad: 管理混亂導致公司最終垮台。
pinyin: Guǎnlǐ hùnluàn dǎozhì gōngsī zuìzhōng kuǎtái.
english: Poor management caused the company to eventually collapse.

sent_simp: 他背着大包走了很远的路。
sent_trad: 他背著大包走了很遠的路。
pinyin: Tā bēi zhe dà bāo zǒu le hěn yuǎn de lù.
english: He walked a long way carrying a large bag on his back.

sent_simp: 她已是九十岁高龄，身体依然很健康。
sent_trad: 她已是九十歲高齡，身體依然很健康。
pinyin: Tā yǐ shì jiǔshí suì gāolíng, shēntǐ yīrán hěn jiànkāng.
english: She is already ninety years old and still in very good health.

sent_simp: 医生建议妈妈坚持用母乳喂养宝宝。
sent_trad: 醫生建議媽媽堅持用母乳餵養寶寶。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiànyì māma jiānchí yòng mǔrǔ wèiyǎng bǎobao.
english: The doctor advises the mother to keep breastfeeding her baby.
